name: IRC_REC_EVENT_INTRV_PARTS
description: This table stores the event interview participants.

columns.Name: INTERVIEW_PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. Auto generated.

columns.Name: INTERVIEW_DETAILS_ID
columns.Comments: To store the interview details id. Foreign Key to IRC_REC_EVENT_INTRV_DTLS.

columns.Name: EVENT_POOL_MEMBER_ID
columns.Comments: To store the event pool member id. Foreign Key to IRC_REC_EVENT_POOL_MEMBERS.

columns.Name: INTERVIEWER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: To store the interviewer person id. Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: To store the participant person id. Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_CODE
columns.Comments: Column to store feedback code for the participant which is configured in HCM_LOOKUP table. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_REC_EVT_INTR_FDBCK_CD.

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date in which the feedback of the participant is submitted.

columns.Name: FEEDBACK_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: To store the feedback comments entered by the interviewer

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
